regions.text: This is a boy. He will be a man. He was a baby. He seems to be about twelve years old now.
Every night he has a long sleep in his bed. He goes to bed at eight every night.
He gets up every morning at seven. He gets out of bed and gives himself a good wash.
He puts his clothing on. He says "Good morning" to his mother and father and takes his place at the table.
